query: SELECT id, slug, name, auth_method FROM integration_providers WHERE slug IN ('bls', 'fred', 'bea', 'census-bureau') OR name LIKE '%BLS%' OR name LIKE '%FRED%' OR name LIKE '%BEA%' OR name LIKE '%Census%';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3S2TaCfAdzc6QNm.b8cc9e16633a --database GaKEFERPH576tbv5NzvkMD --execute SELECT id, slug, name, auth_method FROM integration_providers WHERE slug IN ('bls', 'fred', 'bea', 'census-bureau') OR name LIKE '%BLS%' OR name LIKE '%FRED%' OR name LIKE '%BEA%' OR name LIKE '%Census%';
